def: The office or profession of an attorney; agency for another.Shak.
A gradual progression from one type to another, generallyascending. Huxley.
The state or quality of being insatiable; insatiableness.Eagerness for increase of possession deluges the soul, and we sinkinto the gulfs of insatiability. Rambler.
An artificer who works in timber; a framer and builder ofhouses, ships, etc.
The act of making perpetual, or of preserving from extinctionthrough an endless existence, or for an indefinite period of time;continuance. Sir T. Browne.
Not eloquent; not fluent, graceful, or pathetic; notpersuasive; as, ineloquent language.Nor are thy lips ungraceful, sire of men, Nor tongue ineloquent.Milton.
The tissue which fills the cavities of most bones; the medulla.In the larger cavities it is commonly very fatty, but in the smallercavities it is much less fatty, and red or reddish in color.
The act of detorting, or the state of being detorted; atwisting or warping.
A cock, so called from the clearness or loundness of his voicein crowing.
